name: Perennial International Limited
summary: Perennial International Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in electric cables and wire products. It offers power cords, power cord sets, cables and solid wires, wire harnesses and accessories, and plastic resins and compounds. The company also engages in property holding and license activities. It serves multi-national producers of electrical and electronic products primarily in the United States, Europe, Australia, Mainland China, Japan, and Southeast Asia. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Tsimshatsui, Hong Kong. Perennial International Limited is a subsidiary of Spector Holdings Limited.
